## TL;DR
From the security team's lens, Plan X preserves our audit posture; Plan Y forces tradeoffs we can't absorb.
[stance: prefer]

## Argument
Security team's win-condition: audit trail must remain immutable + queryable by
incident timeline. Plan X preserves both. Plan Y's batch-commit model loses 15-minute
granularity, which is below our minimum incident-reconstruction floor.
Red-line: any plan that loses sub-hour audit granularity.
